message:
chore(beads): re-close 15 beads reverted by JSONL drift

Per memory feedback_br_sync_drift, prior close commits got
silently reverted by other agents' br sync flushes from stale
SQLite. Re-closing all today-shipped beads via direct JSONL
edit. The underlying code fixes are unaffected — verified each
helper (force_raw_encoding, score_bound_value, parse_memory_size_arg,
validate_lex_bound) is still in the source tree.

Re-closed: 2juo, 2yc4, 84bv, gcmq, ky4n, m5nf, moer, nz2v, nzaw,
ot1z, qcmh, s0v0, ud94, xvlj, yj7h.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
